added_preview: # Known integer-biased fields in cross-source event data:
#   depth:  USGS earthquake default depth=10 km when not measured.
#           ~44% of M>=5 events have depth=10 (not physical, it's a
#           sentinel value). This inflates n6_check EXACT counts.
#   mag:    Query boundary effect. Fetching minmagnitude=5.0 makes
#           mag=5.0 the most common value (truncation pile-up).
#           EventLog.add_event stores seti_score in metadata AND
#           For earthquake events: score == seti_score == mag.
#           This means the SAME magnitude appears in 3 fields
#           any n6_check EXACT hit count on that value.
